lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Welcome to my humble guild [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Quite a place you've got here.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Indeed we do. Would you like to know more about it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the strength training area.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Ahh the mighty warrior Sloane guards the strength training area. This intriguing little area consists of two shotput lanes for different weights of shot. It's fairly simple, the Referee or Sloane can explain more. You

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: may find yourself panting for breath though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh? Why?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Well you see my dear [boy/lady], the games there really do sap your energy quite a bit. You can find it just up the stairs behind the bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the attack training area.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Ahhh, dummies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm no dummy, I just want to know what is there!

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Oh no my dear [man/lady], I did not mean you at all! The training area has mechanical dummies which pop up out of holes in the floor. The noble dwarf Gamfred invented the mechanism and Ajjat can explain more about what

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: to do there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok, I'll have to try it out!

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: You can find it just down the corridor and on your right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the defence training area.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: To polish your defensive skills to the very highest level we've employed a most inventive dwarf and a catapult.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're going to throw dwarves at me?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Oh my no! I think Gamfred would object to that most strongly.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: He's an inventor you see and has built a marvellous contraption that can throw all sorts of things at you including magic missiles...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmmm?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: ....spiked iron balls.....

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err....

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: ....spinning slashing blades....

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ummm...

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: ... and even anvils.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ANVILS!?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: No need to be afraid, it's all under very controlled conditions! You can find it just up the stairs behind the bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the combat training area.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Ahh yes, our resident magician from foreign lands created a most amazing gadget which can turn your own armour against you! It's really quite intriguing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds dangerous. What if I'm wearing it at the time?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: So far that's not happened. You need to speak to Shanomi about the specifics of the process, but as I understand it, putting a suit of armour in one of these devices will make it come to life some how. The better

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: the armour, the harder it is to 'kill'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fighting my own armour, that sounds... weird. I could be killed by it...

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Indeed we have had a few fatalities from warriors over stretching themselves and not knowing their limits. Start small and work up is my motto! That and go see Lidio for some food if you need it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks for the warning.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about tokens.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Ahh, yes, our token system is designed to allow you an appropriate amount of time with my discovery in the very top floor of the guild. I won't spoil the surprise as to what that is. Go up and see for yourself. Now, the

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: amount of tokens you collect from the various activities around the guild will dictate how long Kamfreena will allow you in the enclosure on the very top floor. More tokens equals more time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what's up there?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: If I told you it would spoil the surprise!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok ok... so how do I earn and claim these tokens?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: You can earn them simply by using the training exercises around the guild, the staff will then enter this into a ledger as you play. You can claim them by simply asking any of the staff at the training areas, or

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You any good with a sword?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Am I any good with....a sword... Have you any clue who I am?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not really... no.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Why I could best any person alive in a rapier duel!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Try me then!

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: My dear [sir/lady], I couldn't possibly duel you, I might hurt you and then what would happen to my reputation! Besides, I have this wonderful guild to run. Why don't you take a look at the various activities we

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: have. You might even collect enough tokens to be allowed in to kill the strange beasts from the east!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Farewell [brave warrior/fair lady], I do hope you enjoy my guild.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Welcome to my humble Guild [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you, Harrallak?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: I've lost two of my dear friends, [player name]. This old place doesn't seem to be the same since they're gone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I feel responsible.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Nonsense, my friend! They both died bravely fighting against a great evil! There is no blame on you for that.

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Remember them for who they were and what they stood for. Mourn their loss, but never bear the burden of their death, for that is not what they would want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what about vengeance?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Ah, now that is a topic we could debate for many moons, my friend. Still, regardless of the reason, know that when the time comes, I will fight beside you against Lucien once more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me more about the Guild?

lines.speaker: Harrallak Menarous
lines.text: Of course. What would you like to know about?
